mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_post ( post_id, member_id, trip_id, content, image_url, view_count, like_count, repost_count, created_at ) VALUES ( FEED_POST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{tripId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow (follow_id, follower_id, following_id) VALUES (FOLLOW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{followerId}, #{followingId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT F.post_id, F.member_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(F.content, 4000, 1) as content, F.image_url, F.like_count, TO_CHAR(F.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as created_at, M.nickname, M.profile_image, T.trip_id, T.trip_name, NVL(T.total_budget, 0) as total_budget, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{loginMemberId} AND following_id = F.member_id) as is_following FROM feed_post F LEFT JOIN member2 M ON F.member_id = M.member_id LEFT JOIN trip T ON F.trip_id = T.trip_id ORDER BY F.post_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FEED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (like_id, member_id, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_LIKES_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{postId}, 'FEED', SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FEED'
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.post_id as postId, c.member_id as memberId, c.parent_comment_id as parentCommentId, c.content, c.del_yn as delYn, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m.nickname, m.profile_image as profileImage FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment ( comment_id, post_id, member_id, parent_comment_id, content, del_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( POST_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{memberId}, NVL(#{parentCommentId}, 0), #{content}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
